summary: Backend-only regression for Phase 1 deep-analysis additions to /api/audit/compute. Verified new kpis, kpis_prev, kpis.trend and scores (health_score, fraud_risk_score, risk_breakdown, section_scores) fields, plus regression that all pre-existing audit sections remain intact. 19 new assertions in test_audit_deep_analysis_phase1.py + 19 existing audit-center tests (test_audit_center_93.py + test_audit_center_clickable_96.py) all PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/audit.py is 1904 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into /app/backend/routes/audit/{sessions,compute,kpis,scores}.py modules as follow-up.

_compute_scores relies on section severity strings ('ok','warning','critical','info') — adding a new section without a matching severity key would silently be ignored. Suggest defaulting missing severity → 'info' with a log warning.
kpis_prev silently becomes None if date parsing fails (bare except). Narrow to ValueError and log a warning so backend regressions surface; currently any exception (incl. DB error) hides the issue.
test_credentials: Regression org admin: test_org_admin@regression.local / RegressionPass!2026 (auto-seeded via /app/backend/tests/_org_test_helpers.py). Branch auto-picked from GET /api/branches.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Audit sessions created by TestAuditSessionsCrud are cleaned up via DELETE in the same test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 deep-analysis backend additions verified end-to-end. New test file /app/backend/tests/test_audit_deep_analysis_phase1.py covers: (1) KPI ribbon fields + gross-margin/void-rate formula cross-checks, (2) kpis_prev + trend deltas, (3) health_score + fraud_risk_score range/label, (4) risk_breakdown 7-factor structure & per-factor caps (Void 25, Discount 15, Edit 15, Off-hours 10, Corrections 10, Security 15, PriceMatch 10 = 100), (5) section_scores weights sum to ~100 with inventory redistribution verified on partial audit (cash→21.7, ar/sales/returns/transfers/unverified/payables→11.7, digital/activity/returns→6.7). Existing 12-test test_audit_center_93.py + 7-test test_audit_center_clickable_96.py suites still pass — no pre-existing field was removed. To rerun: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://sms-scheduler-7.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/test_audit_deep_analysis_phase1.py backend/tests/test_audit_center_93.py backend/tests/test_audit_center_clickable_96.py -v.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. Assertions also cross-check the documented formulas (gross_margin = (rev-cogs)/rev*100, void_rate = voided/total_txns*100, fraud_risk = sum(points) capped at 100, section weight redistribution when inventory unavailable), all matched within 0.5 tolerance.
